{{Quote|No one denies the Zann Consortium. No one.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="Forces" />}}
The '''Skirmish on Saleucami''' was a mission to corrupt [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] into supporting the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].

==The Battle==
{{Quote|Ignore the outer defenses. Rush the governor!|Urai Fen|<ref name="Forces" />}}
Urai Fen led his forces into battle, destroying several turrets placed in their path, then enemy infantry and vehicles. After getting past those defenses Urai Fen found [[Koong Eeth]] and then severely injured him.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Well done. The planet is corrupted. When the governor recovers he will be much more likely to do what we tell him. Tyber Zann's plans must not be hindered in any way.|Urai Fen|<ref name="Forces" />}}
The planet was successfully corrupted into serving the Zann Consortium, allowing [[Tyber Zann]] to send another defiler to sabotage the shield generator and sending Urai Fen down there again to [[Battle of Saleucami (Zann Consortium)|capture]] the planet.

==Behind the scenes==
The player does not have to intimidate Saleucami. Instead, the player could do a racketeering operation there.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
